title: dflow starters registry
description: Aggregated catalog of all starters under starters/**/dflow.template.json (see docs/registry-v1.md).

registryVersion.description: Format version of this registry document.

starters.description: All validated templates, sorted by id.

id.description: Same as manifest.id; must be unique in this array.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the starter directory (e.g. starters/frontend/react-vite).

manifestPath.description: Repo-relative path to dflow.template.json for this starter.
